calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Ericka Larnauti, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff: Resurgence Financial, LLC.
Defendant: Brian Brophy, present in propria persona.
Parties have settled and the terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant shall make payments to the Plaintiff of $200.00 monthly for 8 months for a total of $1,600.00, payable on the 10th of each month. First payment is due on Feb. 10, 2007.
If Defendant defaults in his payments, the Plaintiff may enter a judgment for $2,839.00 less credits of payments already made.
If Defendant complies with the terms of this settlement, the Plaintiff shall file a Notice of Settlement and a Dismissal.
The court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
